title: Import Tableau Cloud Dashboards to Reports and Dashboards Tab
story: As a data analyst, I want to import Tableau Cloud dashboards into the DataTools Pro Reports & Dashboards page, so that I can manage all my analytics assets from Salesforce and Tableau in one place.
description:
Extend the Tableau integration to import published Tableau Cloud dashboards into the Reports & Dashboards management page. Users can browse dashboards by project and workbook, then add them to the managed list.

### Implementation
- Added a 'Dashboard' link to the Tableau admin list
- Clicking the link shows Tableau dashboards in a table with project and workbook context
- All existing Reports & Dashboards features apply: filters, metric listing, category assignment
acceptance_criteria: Tableau Cloud dashboards can be browsed by project and workbook
Dashboards can be added to the Reports & Dashboards managed list
All existing filters work with Tableau dashboards
Metrics associated with Tableau dashboards are listed
Category/taxonomy assignment works for Tableau dashboards
ux_changes: New Tableau dashboards section on the Reports & Dashboards page with project/workbook context. Full filter and category assignment support.
middleware_changes: Tableau API integration to retrieve published dashboards from Tableau Cloud.
data_model_changes: Extended the reports/dashboards data model to support Tableau dashboard entries with project and workbook metadata.
api_changes: Tableau REST API calls to fetch dashboard lists with project and workbook associations.
implementation_notes: Dashboard retrieval was implemented on the admin side first, then integrated into the Reports & Dashboards page with all existing features (filters, metrics, categories).
comment_summary: Developer retrieved Tableau dashboards via API and added them to the admin side first. Then integrated into the Reports & Dashboards page with full filter and category support.
